name: hasHeatTreatment
description: Handle identifier for a resource documenting the heat treatment process applied to a material sample.
ExpectedUse: Recording thermal processing history for materials, linking samples to annealing, quenching, tempering, or other heat treatment procedures affecting microstructure and properties.

Properties.Name: hasHeatTreatment
Properties.Title: Has Heat Treatment
Properties.Description: Handle identifier for a resource documenting the heat treatment process applied to a material sample.
